## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (pytest / vitest / cargo test as appropriate)
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (or the individual suite for your change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated if this is user-visible
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes the MCP tool surface, HTTP API, or
      desktop app behavior
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification in the PR body
- [ ] PRIVACY.md / SECURITY.md updated if this touches data flow, network
      calls, or the trust boundary

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: known rough edges, follow-up work you're
deferring, or design decisions you'd like feedback on. -->
